title: DTECH 2026 Video Spotlight – Wildfire prevention moves east with Pano AI
description: At DTECH 2026, we sat down with Arvind Satyam, co-funder and chief commercial officer of Pano AI, to discuss the company's recent growth, its expanding capabilities, and the real-world impact of wildfire detection and response programs.
content: At DTECH 2026, we sat down with Arvind Satyam, co-funder and chief commercial officer of Pano AI, to discuss the company's recent growth, its expanding capabilities, and the real-world impact of wildfire detection and response programs.
